xs.$description: Small gap; tag clusters, pill groups, screen-header actions gap

sm.$description: Form grid gap, list item gap (trips, members, planner items)

md.$description: Standard layout gap; dashboard-header, modal-sheet header, detail-header

lg.$description: Dominant spacing value in Maycation. Card padding, page-shell gap, dashboard grid gap, modal-sheet gap, day-tile gap. Intentionally 18px — preserves established visual rhythm, not normalized to 20px

xl.$description: App-shell horizontal padding, panel padding (dashboard-panel, auth-panel)

2xl.$description: Reserved for future large-spacing needs; no current prominent usage in canonical CSS
